text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... That's interval training done!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, what's next on the list? C'mon, hurry up and tell me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Working with Vodka has been more straightforward than I expected.
We're making good progress.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With her long strides and flexible body, her future looks promising.
choice_data_list:
All right, let's increase your load a bit more
then.

All right, let's increase your load a bit more
then.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Bring it on! I gotta show off how cool I am!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, one day...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, crap. I forgot to turn in my application for the Tracen Meet.
Better get that thing in quick...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh, ya don't know? Oh right, there hasn't been one yet since you
joined the academy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's basically this big event that happens twice a year. Everyone signs
up and gets to pick the type of race they wanna run.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: We get people from all over the place comin' to watch!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Plus, it's a chance for us pre-debut runners to test ourselves against
those who've already debuted.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The best part of this event is that if you get assigned to the same
group, it doesn't matter who's debuted or not—all you gotta do is run!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Man, I can't wait! I need to make sure everyone sees my cool side!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And y'know what, Trainer? I think today's an awesome day to get
some grub outside!
choice_data_list: Sure, you deserve it for working so hard!
Sure, you deserve it for working so hard!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad we're on the same page! Wait right here, Imma go get
changed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, Vodka and I head out for a meal.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Daaang, I ate so much! I know I gotta watch my weight, but it's nice
having a cheat meal like that once in a while!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: D-do you see that super cool poster over there?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking over, I see a flashy poster depicting an Umamusume riding a
big motorcycle.
choice_data_list: Looks like they're showing a new movie.
Looks like they're showing a new movie.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A movie, huh... Oh man, it'd be so cool to see that huge bike on the
screen...
choice_data_list:
Since we're already here, why don't we go
watch it?

Since we're already here, why don't we go
watch it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wait, are you for real?! Hell yeah!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That... was... the coolest thing I've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Didja see how close they were to the ground while roundin' those
curves? That was such a cool chase scene!
choice_data_list: I didn't know you were so into motorcycles.
I didn't know you were so into motorcycles.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: How could anyone not be?! I just can't get 'nough of the engine's roar or the sleek body!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, my pops owns one of those bad boys. When I was little, he'd
always give me rides around town.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man, now those were good times! I'm telling you, big bikes are where
it's at!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, the first time I went to the Japanese Derby, I was on
the back of my pops' ride.
choice_data_list:
So your dad's the one who introduced you to
racing.

So your dad's the one who introduced you to
racing.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yep, he loves it! He'd always tell me, "Vodka, those racers are the
coolest of the cool."

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get it at all the first time he told me. But once I saw a race for
real...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: When the gates opened, I instantly got shivers down my spine. You could just feel the tension in the air.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I blinked once from the beginning till the end. It was the
craziest thing I'd ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Every racer had these insane auras that were saying stuff like, "I won't
back down!" "Get outta the way!" "Victory is mine!"

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I remember screamin' my head off about how cool it was during the
ride home. I couldn't really see his face from the back, but I bet my
pops was grinnin' ear to ear.
choice_data_list:
Is that why you decided to become a racer
yourself?

Is that why you decided to become a racer
yourself?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yup. I wanted to be just as cool as those racers!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I had a blast today. Thanks for lettin' me tag along with you to
the movies, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, but y'know that scene before the climax... um, the romantic one...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That, well, y'know... kinda caught me by surprise.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely more into action. I'd prefer folks comin' in guns blazing
rather than that uh... k-ki...
choice_data_list: Oh, you mean the kiss scene?
Oh, you mean the kiss scene?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: D-don't just say it! Ughhh, now I'm rememberin' everything!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Agh?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: G-got a nosebleed...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day after our eventful outing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're working our way through one of our usual training sessions
when another student appears.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Vodka! You're in Group 10 for the 2000-meter turf race
at the Tracen Meet, right?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh, me? Yeah, what about it?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted to check if you were planning on changing your group...
You still have enough time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What? Change? Why would I need ta do that?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, "why"? Didn't you see who's in it?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Narita Brian is in your group!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna race against Brian?!
